title: AFMD: A few more deco
body:
🎨 Introducing AFMD: A FEW MORE DECO
AFMD (A Few More Deco) is a mod that adds over 50 themed decoration blocks to the game, enhancing your building experience. We’re also planning to add many more blocks and features in future updates!

🌟 What’s Included in AFMD?

In this beta version, you’ll find a variety of decorative items, including themed decorations for Christmas ! Whether you’re looking to add a comfy touch to your builds or simply enhance your home, AFMD offers options to get you started







🛠️ How to Access the Decorations

To unlock the decorative items, craft a Creation Core using one dye and four iron ingots. Once you have the Creation Core, use it in the stonecutter to create the various decorations.

🎮 Stay Tuned for Future Updates!

We’re excited about the potential of AFMD and are committed to adding more decorations and features in future releases. Your feedback is invaluable as we work on improving the mod!

Model Credits:
EliteCreatures
